name: Darok
short_description: Darok is a simple 2d platformer where you have to navigate Darok back home. There are breakable floors, moving platforms and Geysers to help Darok on his journey home.
detailed_description:
Darok is a simple 2d platformer where you have to navigate Darok back home. There are breakable floors, moving platforms and Geysers to help Darok on his journey home.

- You can smash through some floors by gaining enough height to overcome their strength number.
- Geysers are activated by smashing them from any height and will launch you into the air.
- Moving platforms help you traverse large gaps.
- The final gate can be opened by activating all 10 Obelisks spread across the map, you can activate the Obelisks by smashing the ground near them.
about_the_game:

- The final gate can be opened by activating all 10 Obelisks spread across the map, you can activate the Obelisks by smashing the ground near them.
